tasks.title: Pro-Agent LLM defaults visible in global settings
tasks.details: Add a dedicated per-agent LLM overview/edit flow in Settings so operator does not need to open each agent panel.

tasks.title: Validate temperature/context_limit inputs
tasks.details: Add inline validation and clamping feedback in Agent Panel for temperature 0..2 and context_limit >= 256.

tasks.title: Add explicit codex provider option
tasks.details: Add explicit provider id for OpenAI Codex in provider catalog and UI labels, with model suggestions and capability metadata.

tasks.title: Per-agent API-key profile selection
tasks.details: Allow selecting stored key profiles per agent (instead of plaintext entry), including OpenAI/Codex.

tasks.title: Add tests for temperature/context_limit routing
tasks.details: Verify /llm/generate forwards temperature and context_limit from request and llm_config fallback.

tasks.title: Add live smoke for opencode+LMStudio context errors
tasks.details: Add integration smoke that detects n_ctx incompatibility and returns actionable diagnostics.
